source.purpose: Protect the shared SF2 core prompt identity while preserving typed state authority, role ownership, player agency, and hidden-information boundaries.

narrator.prose: (unused - fixture asserts on rendered system prompt)

systemContainsAll: Storyforge is a solo text RPG that takes the player and the fiction seriously.
The world should feel coherent enough to push back when the player pushes on it.
Each role stays inside its ownership boundary
The world pushes back through observable, coherent consequence, not hidden punishment or unseen facts revealed from outside the character's reach.
